customer.title: Your details
customer.name: Your name
customer.planDiscount: 🎁 {{discount}}% discount on extras, products and services outside the plan.
customer.planActiveBlock: This customer already has an active booking in the plan and can only book again after completing the current appointment.

confirmation.title: Confirm booking
confirmation.dataBookingInfo: · Selected date, time, service and barber
confirmation.dataUsage: Used to manage the booking, send the management link and operational contact. You can export or delete your data at any time through the booking link. Retention: 3 years.
confirmation.consentLabel: I authorise the processing of my personal data for managing this booking, under the terms described above.

features.title: A stronger barbershop experience, from the very first booking.
features.easyBookingDesc: Book in seconds, no calls or messages needed.
features.realTimeSlotsDesc: See available slots at any minute.
features.guaranteedConfirmationDesc: Receive immediate confirmation of your booking.

howItWorks.title: Fast booking, premium feel.
howItWorks.subtitle: In under 2 minutes everything is sorted.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Select from haircuts, beard trims, treatments and more.
howItWorks.step2Desc: See who's available and pick your favourite.
howItWorks.step3Desc: View free slots and reserve yours.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Receive confirmation and show up on time.

gallery.title: The atmosphere and style of {{name}}
gallery.subtitle: Each barbershop can showcase its space, cuts and visual identity.

cta.title: Ready for a new look?
cta.subtitle: Book now and secure your slot at {{name}} without waiting or calling.

promo.label: This week's highlight
promo.defaultText: Take advantage of this barbershop's active campaign and book your slot.
promo.bullet2: See the next available slot right away.

services.title: Available services
services.subtitle: Choose the ideal service — view prices, duration and book directly.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Take professional care home — products used by our barbers.
products.unavailableMsg: This barbershop has chosen not to show products on the public site at this time.

plans.title: Plans and subscriptions
plans.subtitle: Subscribe to a plan and save on every visit — included services, no surprises.
plans.unavailableMsg: This barbershop has chosen not to show plans on the public site at this time.

modal.title: Subscribe to plan
modal.subtitle: {{name}} · {{price}}
modal.warning: This plan can only be activated after payment confirmation or directly by the barbershop.
modal.successMsg: The request for {{name}} has been registered.

manageBooking.title: Confirm, cancel or reschedule without calling.
manageBooking.subtitle: Use this page to manage your booking at {{shopName}}.
manageBooking.missingToken: Booking token missing. Open the full management link to continue.

privacy.title: Privacy & data
privacy.subtitle: Your GDPR rights — access, portability and deletion
privacy.info: Identifying data is retained for 3 years from the last booking. You can request anonymisation at any time.

confirmAnonymize.title: Confirm data anonymisation
confirmAnonymize.warning: This action will replace your identifying personal data (name, phone, email, notes) with an anonymous identifier across {{shopName}}.
confirmAnonymize.bullet1: · The operational history of bookings (dates, services, duration) is kept anonymously.
confirmAnonymize.bullet3: · The link to this booking will stop working after anonymisation.

reschedule.title: Reschedule
reschedule.subtitle: Choose another day and a free slot for the same service.
reschedule.noSlots: No available slots for that day.
